name: OmopConditionCodes
title: OMOP Condition-domain codes (example subset)
description: Codes that route a FHIR Condition (or domain-routed Procedure/Observation) to the OMOP `condition_occurrence` table. Authoritative expansion: vocab.concept WHERE domain_id = 'Condition' AND standard_concept = 'S' (~105,666 standard concepts, almost entirely SNOMED). Source vocabularies like ICD10CM are non-standard; they map *to* SNOMED via concept_relationship 'Maps to' and become Conditions on the OMOP side.

extension.valueString: SELECT vocabulary_id, concept_code, concept_name FROM vocab.concept WHERE domain_id = 'Condition' AND standard_concept = 'S'
